title: Easy Saber-toothed Tiger Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Saber-toothed Tiger Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color this friendly cartoon Saber-toothed tiger with big fangs. Free printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Saber-toothed Tigers are the largest wild cats in the world, instantly recognized by their orange coats and unique black stripes.
No two Saber-toothed Tigers have the exact same stripe pattern, and their skin under the fur is also striped.
